storyInfo: Rankin's group successfully take the outpost, only to come face-to-face with the arrival of the Ursine Armies after lighting the torch of victory. In the village, Vetochki rediscovers her memories with Mantra's help, and reveals the Yurodstvo's true nature.

attributes.content: (Yawns)
attributes.name: Restless Soldier

attributes.content: Look sharp. We're on shift for another two hours.
attributes.name: Cautious Soldier

attributes.content: Blyat... not a damn mangler in this ice and snow.
attributes.name: Restless Soldier

attributes.content: Hey... did you hear something?
attributes.name: Cautious Soldier

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Restless Soldier

attributes.content: The soldier turns around, only to see a crossbow bolt punching through his friend's skull.

attributes.name: Restless Soldier
attributes.content: Huh?

attributes.name: Restless Soldier
attributes.content: Ah! Ahhhh—!
Rankin! We got the ones below! Let's go up!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Wait! Don't be rash! Come back!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The miners are gathered under the outpost, gazing at the flashing warning light above their heads.
Watch your heads!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Mmph! Ugh!
attributes.name: Miner A & Miner B

attributes.content: They saw us! They're pulling the ladder!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: We'll have to do this the hard way.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Take all the explosives and come with me, Team 3. We're blowing the outpost door, whatever it takes.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Don't stop if I fall. Take my place.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Team 4, Team 5, keep shooting and cover us!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The rest of you, don't let a single soldier get away.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You got it!
attributes.name: Miner C & Miner D

attributes.content: On my mark—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The searchlight catches them, and it is immediately followed by a hail of projectiles.
Rankin continues to push forward towards the outpost, raising his crossbow and taking aim at the vexing searchlight above their heads.
Argh—!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Suddenly, Rankin feels a sharp pain on his forehead, and the left side of his field of vision is covered in red.
Blood streams down. He hears a ringing in his head.
Rankin? Rankin!
attributes.name: Worried Miner

attributes.content: Not a step back! With me! Push forward!
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: Damn it. We're dead anyway if we go back! Might as well take a few of them down with us!
attributes.name: Angry Miner

attributes.content: The cries around him seem so distant. He can hear the sound of crossbow bolts finding flesh. He can hear the sound of bodies hitting the floor.
He must not fall. Not when victory is so close.
He wills his limbs to move with the last bit of strength he has left, once again raising his crossbow, aiming at that loathsome light above. He pulls the trigger.
They're weakening! Keep up!
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: Now, ready—
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: The door's blown! Charge!
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: The miners' voices feel more and more distant. It is all Rankin can do to keep up.
No one notices him in this battle of life and death.
He leans against the rubble and heads upwards, one small step at a time.
His senses are returning, and his body is getting used to the pain.
He walks over bodies that were alive just a moment ago. The spiral staircase leads to an aperture at the top, where the most beautiful aurora of the Ursine night shines through.
He remembers sitting in the mine elevators, gazing up at the only light above.
Finally, the last step. He finds himself standing amidst the aurora, beneath the stars, with friends.
Rankin?! Are you alright??
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: ...I'm fine.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin wipes away the blood on his forehead and takes a look at his brothers and sisters around him.
Half of us didn't make it...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...But we did it.
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: We did it...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: In the distance, Deity Grypherburg remains hidden behind the thick taiga. The vast, frozen icy lake seems to taunt them for their foolish challenge.
We climbed from the dark mines to the surface, and now we stand atop the Army's outpost.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We will cross the frozen lake and forest, and plant our flags in even more places.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin's eyes burn bright as he tries to communicate his vision to the others.
Their faces are bright with the joy of victory too. They have waited for this day for far too long.
Nikto, we finally—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin turns around, but does not see the familiar figure.
...Nikto?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: *pant*... *pant*...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: I ran away when the first bolt left the crossbow.
It's no shame to be afraid. It is only the most foolish of fools who do not know fear.
Rankin is mad. Everyone who follows him is mad.
I wanted to pull them back. But if they want to die, let them.
I can't die yet.
From cobbler to tutor, to being adopted by a count. I didn't do all that just so that I could die in a place like that.
Die, and it's all over.
I must survive.
Volgrad is just ahead...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: ...Start over, Nikto.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Blyat...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: What the bloody hell is that...?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: A torch!
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: We should light a torch, so that the others will know we've succeeded and come to meet up with us!
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: Yes... you're right.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Light the fire.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: A dull thud coming from the distance shakes the icefields, and makes their eardrums and hearts tremble.
What's that?!
attributes.name: Calm Miner

attributes.content: O-Over there!
attributes.name: Staunch Miner

attributes.content: They look in the direction that he is pointing, and see a massive battleship rising on the horizon, so massive it is hard to tell whether it is a ship or a nomadic city.
The taiga is leveled in an instant, and the stars are veiled by red light.
Snow and tree trunks are torn to pieces and sucked into the sky.
Only now...
Only now do they understand what they are dealing with.
Ursus.
They are dealing with Ursus.
I see...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: So this is what it is...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Raidian?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I just got a message on a public channel.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It says that the Ursine ore veins are near exhausted...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The Armies are trying to cover it up. At least one army is already here in the Far North...!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Did the Doctor's team send the message?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Uncertain, but likely. This is a warning from the Doctor.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The mines becoming exhausted... could it be...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: But I don't understand. Ursus wants to cover it up? Do they plan on killing everyone in the Far North who knows about it?!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: ...I knew it.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The rumors of the ore veins running dry were true... That's the source of all the unusual events. That's what they're trying to hide!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You don't look surprised.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It was the worst-case scenario that I projected, until now.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But now, there is reason to believe it's true. And I have no doubt some of the Army brass are capable of doing such things...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Far North is the most dangerous place on Terra right now. We must leave, immediately.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We haven't made contact with the Doctor yet—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: They sent us a warning. They're in a better position to be informed than we are.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: There's no guarantee that we would find them if we went back now. We would only be wasting our time.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Mon3tr can protect the Doctor. They're less likely to be targeted than a large group.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: But if the Armies have come to cover this up on the government's behalf, how can we be sure that Grypherburg is a safe place to go?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You still don't trust me.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: ...We do need to make sure that...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: 'Kal'tsit.'
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The name once again came to the government's attention not long ago. This mysterious figure has left too many unusual traces on Ursus, and across all of Terra.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Information about her is considered top-secret in Ursus. For this reason, some of us harbor hope that she can answer certain questions that Ursus is facing right now.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: ...Who are you, really?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Perhaps a re-introduction is in order...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Eloysius Vasilyevna Gorchekova, Lieutenant of the Tsar's Battalion, Ursine Imperial Guard. I answer to... Chairman Islam Witte of the State Council.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: My orders are to investigate reports of mutated Infected and associated incidents in the Central Mining District of the Far North, and...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: ...To make contact with Rhodes Island.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I know it's a little late to claim sincerity, and it's true that I had intended to keep this a secret.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Whether you believe it or not, however, I can tell you that I could have dealt with you in Bresk, if I had any ill intent.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: This is not the sort of cooperation that Rhodes Island seeks, but I can understand your position.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Let's set the argument aside for now... what's your plan, Eloysius?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I have vehicles on the southwest shore of Lake Neva, about ten kilometers from here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It's not much, but it should be enough to take everyone away from here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I can hide them in a village outside Grypherburg, then find a way to get you inside the city under the government's protection.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Mantra said that the people here are still under the influence of the Yurodstvo. We need to free them from its control first.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: She can find the Yurodstvo, but not a way to deal with it?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I have no desire to witness a tragedy, but my duty comes first. I must ensure that someone is alive to bring word back to Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: If you insist on getting everyone out of here safely...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I can give you one hour, no more.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Understood. I will make it quick.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I think I've made a breakthrough.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra carefully projects her perception into every corner.
She identifies one little fluctuation amidst all the numb, unmoving thoughts.
...Babushka...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Let's go... let's leave here... alright?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: If you stand up, everyone will... follow.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We'll go south, to Deity Grypherburg, or... anywhere, just not...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Just not here.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: ...Okay?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki takes a knee before the illusion that she believes to be her grandmother. She takes the hands that do not exist to Mantra's eyes, and rubs her cheeks against them.
It is only when she sees the tears on the girl's face that Mantra realizes how frightening this trust is. The girl continues to do so, even without getting any response.
Mantra remembers Raidian's words.
'Vetochki's parents were executed for organizing a strike. Her grandmother is her only family now.'
'It seems as though everyone in the mining district knew Nadia, including the guards.'
'They sought her assistance more than they sought the medical team's. They sought comfort when they were in pain, insight when they were lost, and found a strange peace in her words.'
'...I should have noticed that something wasn't right. I thought she was just a respected old woman.'
Please, babushka...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Mantra watches the girl before her, and gently makes her own voice appear in the girl's mind.
She believes you will find peace here.
Once all hope is gone.
Who—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki.
Vetochki turns around to see the Phidia standing behind her.
Y-You know, my name? But I never, told you...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: In this place, at least, you should be able to express yourself clearly.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But you're talking in the same way that you usually do, which means that you've not been seriously affected...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Perhaps there's still a way for you to wake up.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Is Nadia your family?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yes, she's... she's my babushka.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: And my only, family.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Are you sure?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Of course I am. She's my, babushka.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Your babushka wants everyone to endure their pain.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: So that they have no desire to live, nor choose to end their own pain and die.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No, no—babushka wouldn't!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: She's just tired, like everyone... Everyone's just, tired.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We want to live. Of course we do! But there's always people, who don't want us to...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Always someone...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Who?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Th-The Patrol Units.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You defeated the Patrol Units.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Th-The guards, and, the people, in the lab.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: They're not here.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I, I—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Who else doesn't want you to live?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The black... monster...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: And... and...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Why? I... I can't remember...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Let me ask again.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Are you holding the hands of your family?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Turn around, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Vetochki does not want to turn around. As long as she does not do so, those cold and withered hands will forever remain the way they are.
Tell me. What do you see?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Don't turn around. Don't turn around. Don't turn around.
She keeps telling herself.
But she turned around.
Babushka is in front of her. Babushka is singing a lullaby.
I... I see Babushka Nadia.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: No. Look more closely.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Babushka is in front of her. Her hands are cold.
What do you see?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I see... circle. I see—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Red.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki frantically shakes her head.
Why...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Why is it always red?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Babushka sitting, babushka standing, babushka, colors ever-changing.
Babushka lying in a pool of blood, deciding that Vetochki may die.
Brrr. Is this what autumn is like in Ursus? I would hate to see what they call winter.
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: An open-air party, with no lawn or picnic table? What are you inviting us here to see?
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: Entertainment you don't get in Kazimierz, no matter how rich you are.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: A few lives and deaths, big deal. I doubt those miners we saw on the way could give us a show that measures up to knightsports.
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: The knights fight every year, but Breskenoy hasn't seen a single death sentence in a decade under the rule of the current Grand Duchess! This is a truly rare event.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: Death sentence? Who's the criminal?
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: A miner couple caught in the act, plotting to organize an Infected strike.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: My, my, how awful...
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: Yes. It was such a horrendous crime that the Grand Duchess apparently wept when she signed the death warrant.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: But there is no precedence for humane death sentences in these parts. It's easy to bury them in the nearby swamps, but it would be such a waste of a rare death sentence, wouldn't it?
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: Which is why we're here.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: The procedures start with whipping. I heard paying guests like us even get to pick the whip, add blades to it, soak it in brine...
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: What if they died sooner than planned and their rocks exploded in front of us? I had this dress made just for this trip, you know.
attributes.name: Picky Woman

attributes.content: That won't be a problem! Their infection isn't that bad. It would have taken them years to die if they didn't commit their crime.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: As for the party and picnic that you asked about, you'll see it soon enough.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: Now, let's get ourselves warm by the fire.
attributes.name: Eager Man

attributes.content: Are they still breathing?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Th-The woman's still babbling treason...
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Is the man dead?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Cut his tongue out yesterday.
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Why not cut the woman's too?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Th-The guests yesterday said no.
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: They wanted to hear her scream—
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Did she?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: No! Not even once. She keep repeating her 'petitions', saying things like 'for the other children who died in the mines'...
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Couldn't understand a word of it! She must be mad.
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Wouldn't have tried to start a strike if she wasn't.
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: *sigh* Cut the woman's tongue too.
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Yes, sir!
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: And that kid. She was standing there yesterday too, wasn't she?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Yes. The constable wanted her to stand there and watch, until her parents breathe their last.
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Then send her back to the quarters once they're dead.
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: I'm afraid she has to go down to the mines with her mom's lamp and ID. She was born in a mine, you know, which makes her a miner too.
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: ...Does she have a lamp? Do you see a lamp in her hands?
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: N-No, sir!
attributes.name: Soldier On Duty

attributes.content: Then send her back to the quarters once it's done, mudak!
attributes.name: Impatient Guard

attributes.content: Vetochki... here, take these. Butter, minced meat, chocolate... Good girl.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: D-Don't get any wrong ideas! It wasn't my husband who sold your parents out! I earned these myself, pushing the carts in the mines!
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: There's only you and your babushka now. Take care of her, alright?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Tell her she doesn't need to return the scissors she borrowed. Come find me if you ever need anything...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I'll do what I can to help.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: *sigh* My kid would be around your age, if she had lived.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: She said some other things, but I never answered.
Was it because I couldn't talk, or because I had already walked away and went home?
All I know is that I saw red—
Red dripping on greyish-white plastic.
I thought I was back outside at that place again... but no.
It was babushka.
Argh—ahhhh!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Ugh...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Yesterday, and today. I learned that the red inside a human body isn't endless. It will dry up. It makes people hurt. It brings death.
So I tried to stop the red that was flowing out, with my hands, like the game that I played with my friends when I was little.
'Whoever picks up the most water has the most happiness.'
'Whoever bags the most winds has the most freedom.'
*Sob* *sob*—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: No—no, no!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I can't keep it.
I must keep it.
I can't—
Babushka...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Babushka.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The cold body sinks into the plastic, into the mud, before my eyes. I look up and see 'it'.
A pale, standing shadow.
I cried—
I'm here.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: ...You told me to, endure, and forgive.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: To survive, yes.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: Must we still, endure?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Endure, and share, other pain, only leads to death now.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Do we endure... for nothing?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Desire anything, and you will only sin. Your suffering soul needs eternal peace.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: Come, child. Come into my embrace.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: ...Did you forgive too?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I forgave.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: We must accept the life that Ursus has granted, as we accept the death that Ursus has granted. We must not choose. We must not struggle.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: Did you forgive? For killing mom, and dad... your own, child.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Yes, I forgive.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: 'I forgive'?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Then... no.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're not Babushka Nadia.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Babushka wouldn't, forgive like this. Not forgive for peace.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: She won't forgive. She won't endure. She's dead... buried.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're not her.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I am.
attributes.name: Nadia?

attributes.content: I am—
I am?
■■, submit to ■■...
Or... ■■ destruction.
Step back, Vetochki!
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Sh-She's not! She's not, Babushka Nadia.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: No, she's not.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But if, she's not, babushka...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Who is she?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The light of Arts floats around Mantra. She has made the foe reveal its true colors.
But it is not yet over. She must continue to build a barrier in the cognitive space, to isolate herself and the entity before her from other people.
In the meantime, she continues to communicate the truth.
'Yurodstvo.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: This is the Yurodstvo that you asked about. It is a demonic creation that has been given this name.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Perhaps it was once human. Now, it is a far cry from the concept of human.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I don't understand...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You don't have to.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I never understood its true nature, even though there was a chance, however minute, that I might have become it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You saw it at the wrong time and called to it. That's all.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The wrong time?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: So... it was wrong, from the beginning?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: It's not your fault, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I'll take over from here.
attributes.name: Mantra
